item.title: Bio-Inspired Robots (Bionic Panda)
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: High-fidelity simulation and real-time control of a bio-inspired panda robot with torque control, MPC/WBC locomotion, and autonomous behaviors.

item.title: Four-Legged Robot Platform
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Design and development of a real-time, torque-controlled quadruped robot using EtherCAT, model-based control, and MPC.

item.title: Deep Learning-Driven Robotic Plastic Waste Sorter
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: A high-speed robotic system for real-time plastic waste detection, classification, and picking using YOLOv4 and delta robot control.

item.title: Robotic Grasping Using Evolutionary Deep Neural Networks
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: AI-based robotic grasping system combining deep neural networks and evolutionary optimization for robust object grasp estimation.
